name: charmmm718--quiver-ai
description:
AI-native SVG vector graphics generation tool. Use when generating SVG graphics from text prompts or converting images to SVG. 
 Supports: (1) Text-to-SVG generation with optional reference images, (2) Image-to-SVG conversion, (3) Real-time streaming rendering,
 (4) Multiple export formats (SVG, PNG, JPEG, WebP). Perfect for logos, illustrations, typography, and animations.
